text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
416 
SNP_TYPE 

LABEL: 
Part D Special Needs Plan (SNP) Type 
DESCRIPTION: This variable describes the type of special needs Part D plan (SNP) for applicable plan benefit 
packages. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: SNP_TYPE 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
0 = Non-SNP 

C = Chronic or Disabling Condition 

D = Dual-Eligible 

I = Institutional 

COMMENT: 
The
